disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus latest updates: Canada reports first presumptive case linked to MV Hondius as global total hits 11 - Yahoo
updates.body_en: Hantavirus latest updates: Canada reports first presumptive case linked to MV Hondius as global total hits 11 Yahoo
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大报告首例疑似汉坦病例，与MV Hondius邮轮相关，全球共11例。

updates.title_en: Lab confirms hantavirus in Canadian cruise passenger - CBC
updates.body_en: Lab confirms hantavirus in Canadian cruise passenger CBC
updates.summary_zh: 实验室确认加拿大邮轮乘客感染汉坦病毒。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius to dock in Rotterdam after onboard cases - The Times of India
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius to dock in Rotterdam after onboard cases The Times of India
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒疫情邮轮MV Hondius将在鹿特丹靠岸。

updates.title_en: Bali increases surveillance for hantavirus - Asia News Network
updates.body_en: Bali increases surveillance for hantavirus Asia News Network
updates.summary_zh: 巴厘岛加强汉坦病毒监测。

updates.title_en: Canada confirms hantavirus case linked to cruise ship outbreak that has killed three passengers - Fox News
updates.body_en: Canada confirms hantavirus case linked to cruise ship outbreak that has killed three passengers Fox News
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大确认邮轮疫情相关汉坦病例，已致3人死亡。

updates.title_en: First positive case of hantavirus in B.C. is a low risk to public - CityNews Vancouver
updates.body_en: First positive case of hantavirus in B.C. is a low risk to public CityNews Vancouver
updates.summary_zh: 不列颠哥伦比亚省首例汉坦阳性，对公众风险低。

updates.title_en: Health Officials Confirm First Case of Hantavirus in North America Stemming from Infected Cruise Ship - People.com
updates.body_en: Health Officials Confirm First Case of Hantavirus in North America Stemming from Infected Cruise Ship People.com
updates.summary_zh: 卫生官员确认北美首例汉坦病例来自感染邮轮。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Headed For Rotterdam - Marine News Magazine
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship Headed For Rotterdam Marine News Magazine
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒疫情邮轮驶往鹿特丹。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship nears end of voyage in Rotterdam - RTE.ie
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship nears end of voyage in Rotterdam RTE.ie
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒疫情邮轮即将抵达鹿特丹结束航程。

updates.title_en: Canada confirms first hantavirus case in British Columbia; study reveals how long the virus can survive a - The Times of India
updates.body_en: Canada confirms first hantavirus case in British Columbia; study reveals how long the virus can survive a The Times of India
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大不列颠哥伦比亚省确诊首例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: WHO keeps evaluation of hantavirus as 'low risk' - Le Monde.fr
updates.body_en: WHO keeps evaluation of hantavirus as 'low risk' Le Monde.fr
updates.summary_zh: WHO 维持汉坦病毒风险评估为低风险。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-hit MV Hondius set to dock in Rotterdam for disinfection - India Today
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-hit MV Hondius set to dock in Rotterdam for disinfection India Today
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒疫情邮轮 MV Hondius 将在鹿特丹停靠消毒。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus Hits Luxury Cruise: MV Hondius Docking for Disinfection - Devdiscourse
updates.body_en: Hantavirus Hits Luxury Cruise: MV Hondius Docking for Disinfection Devdiscourse
updates.summary_zh: 豪华邮轮 MV Hondius 因汉坦病毒疫情停靠消毒。

updates.title_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship due to arrive at Rotterdam port as final destination - Reuters
updates.body_en: Hantavirus-hit cruise ship due to arrive at Rotterdam port as final destination Reuters
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒疫情邮轮即将抵达鹿特丹港终点。

updates.title_en: UKHSA gives update on hantavirus contacts returning to UK - Sky News
updates.body_en: UKHSA gives update on hantavirus contacts returning to UK Sky News
updates.summary_zh: 英国卫生安全局更新返回英国的汉坦病毒接触者情况。

updates.title_en: San Mateo supervisor urges CDC to step up protections amid hantavirus outbreak - KRON4
updates.body_en: San Mateo supervisor urges CDC to step up protections amid hantavirus outbreak KRON4
updates.summary_zh: 圣马特奥官员敦促CDC加强汉坦病毒防护。

updates.title_en: Health worker hospitalised with hantavirus symptoms as nine more arrive in UK - Birmingham Live
updates.body_en: Health worker hospitalised with hantavirus symptoms as nine more arrive in UK Birmingham Live
updates.summary_zh: 英国一名医护人员因汉坦病毒症状住院，另有9人抵达。

updates.title_en: Medic treated in UK as nine Britons exposed to hantavirus arrive - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Medic treated in UK as nine Britons exposed to hantavirus arrive The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 英国9名接触汉坦病毒者抵达，一名医护人员接受治疗。

updates.title_en: Medic with hantavirus symptoms treated in UK hospital as 9 more linked to infected cruise set to arrive - The Mirror
updates.body_en: Medic with hantavirus symptoms treated in UK hospital as 9 more linked to infected cruise set to arrive The Mirror
updates.summary_zh: 英国医护人员因汉坦病毒症状住院，9人与感染邮轮有关。

updates.title_en: VIDEO: 4th possible exposure of Hantavirus in WA - KIRO 7 News Seattle
updates.body_en: VIDEO: 4th possible exposure of Hantavirus in WA KIRO 7 News Seattle
updates.summary_zh: 华盛顿州报告第4例可能的汉坦病毒暴露。

updates.title_en: WHO keeps evaluation of hantavirus as 'low risk' - Gulf News
updates.body_en: WHO keeps evaluation of hantavirus as 'low risk' Gulf News
updates.summary_zh: WHO维持汉坦病毒风险评估为“低风险”。

updates.title_en: PHAC confirms hantavirus case in Canadian isolating in B.C. - CBC
updates.body_en: PHAC confirms hantavirus case in Canadian isolating in B.C. CBC
updates.summary_zh: 加拿大公共卫生局确认不列颠哥伦比亚省一例汉坦病毒病例。

updates.title_en: France confines more than 1,700 on British cruise ship in Bordeaux after gastroenteritis outbreak - AP News
updates.body_en: France confines more than 1,700 on British cruise ship in Bordeaux after gastroenteritis outbreak AP News
updates.summary_zh: 法国在波尔多隔离一艘英国邮轮，1700多人因肠胃炎爆发被限制。
